SpTU 1, 045 [recipes][via cams/gkab]

(o 3') [...] ... [...]

o 4'4'

[...] ša₂ ⸢3?⸣ lu₂UM.ME.A

(o 4') [...] of 3 experts.

o 5'5'

[...] ⸢NAGA?⸣.SI [...] IM x (x) TAG

(o 5') You sprinkle [...] salicornia [...] ....

o 6'6'

[...] SUM MU ša₂ na-⸢ḫi⸣-ri-⸢šu₂?⸣ x (x) [...]

(o 6') [...] ... of his nostril ....

o 7'7'

[...] ša₂ GIG na-ḫi-⸢ri⸣ [...]

(o 7') [...] of the illness of the nostrils [...].

o 8'8'

[...] x ⸢GAZI?sar⸣ U₂ BABBAR ⸢ILLU⸣ [...] x

(o 8') [...] ... mustard, white plant, resin of [...] ....

o 9'9'

[... u₂?]TAL₂.TAL₂ U₂-ḪI.A x [x] x x

(o 9') [...] fennel, plants of ... [...] ... [...] ... [...] he drinks ... salicornia, beer [...] you pour [...] ... [...] ... [...] you pour and then [...] ... [...] ... [...] ... [...]

o 10'10'

[...] ⸢IB?⸣ [...] ⸢NAG?⸣ GAN ⸢NAGA⸣.SI ⸢KAŠ?⸣ [...] ŠUB

o 11'11'

[...] x (x) [...] x UŠ AK x x E x [...] ⸢ŠUB?⸣-ma

o 12'12'

[...] x TA NA x RA x ḪA

o 13'13'

[...] IM? x [x] x GAL [...]

(end obverse missing)
Reverse
rr NaN  (start of reverse missing)
r 1'r 1'

[...] x qu-lip₂-tu MUŠ TUR.⸢RA?⸣ x [...]

(r 1') [...] ... a skin of a young snake ... [...] you blow (it) into his nose.

r 2'2'

[...] ana KIR₄-⸢šu₂⸣ ta-nap-⸢paḫ⸣

r 3'3'

[...] ⸢ŠE?⸣ na₄⸢ga⸣-bu-⸢u⸣ U₂-ḪI.A na-⸢ḫi-ri⸣

(r 3') [...] ..., alum, plants for the nostrils [...] you pour best beer [...] into his nose.

r 4'4'

[...] KAŠ SAG ana KIR₄-šu₂ ta-nam-di

r 5'5'

[...] x na₄ga-bu-u U₂ na-ḫi-ri

(r 5') [...] ... alum, plant(s) for the nostrils.

r 6'6'

[... ap]-pi-šu₂ il-la-ku ana ka-le-e I₃ ḫal-ṣa ana na-ḫi-ri-šu₂ ⸢ta⸣-at-ta-⸢nam⸣-di

(r 6') [...] flows [from] his nose: to stop (it), you repeatedly pour some filtered oil into his nostril.

r 7'7'

[... I₃] ⸢se⸣-er-du ana na-ḫi-ri-šu₂ ⸢ta⸣-at-⸢ta-nam⸣-[di]

(r 7') [...] you repeatedly pour olive [oil] into his nostrils.

r 8'8'

[...] UDU.U₈ ANŠE SUMUN sig₂AKA₃ UM BE ⸢MA⸣ na-ḫir 15-šu₂ ana na-ḫir 2.30-šu₂

(r 8') [...] of ewe, old donkey, fleece of ..., his right nostril, into his left nostril. You put [...] his left [nostril], into his right nostril.

r 9'9'

[... na-ḫir] 2.30-šu₂ ana na-ḫir 15-šu₂ GARan

(catchline)
r 10'10'

[...] x-šu₂ ḫu-up-pa-a

(r 10') [...] his ... broken. [Tablet] of Anu-ikṣur, son of Šamaš-iddin, the exorcist, [descendant] of Šangi-Ninurta, the Urukean. The one who reveres Anu and Ištar will not take away (this tablet).

(colophon)
r 11'11'

[... md]⸢60—ik⸣-ṣur DUMU-A.NI ša m20—SUMna lu₂MAŠ.MAŠ

r 12'12'

[... lu₂KID].BAR—dNIN.URTA lu₂qaq-qar-da-nu⸢ki⸣-u₂

r 13'13'

MUD d60 u₃ d15 la₃ TUM₃
